title: helichrysum album
intro: Helichrysum album, also known as the Curled Leaf Everlasting or False Chamomile, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which aid in wound healing and the reduction of pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Helichrysum album include the potential reduction of symptoms associated with arthritis, the relief of menstrual cramps, and the promotion of relaxation and calmness. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum album include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
